site.name: OmniOpener
site.tagline: Open any file, right in your browser.
site.description: 200+ browser-based file tools. No uploads, no installs. Everything runs client-side.

tools.meta_description: Open, view, and explore .nc (NetCDF) files in your browser. No uploads, no installs — 100% private, runs entirely client-side.
